WarEra Company Profit & Build Optimizer

Per-item and daily profitability for every company a player owns.

    Production sources: Automated Engine (level × 24 PP/day, bonus reduces PP/item) + each Worker (energy × production × (1 + fidelity/100) × 8/21 PP/day). Wage/day per worker = wage × PP/day ÷ (1 + bonus% + fidelity%). Raws are valued at market price (no self-supply assumption).
    Personal — skills & daily income
    Companies — production & profit
    Company Item Bonus % AE Lvl AE Items Workers Worker Items Total Items/day Sell Price Inputs Wages/day AE Net/day Workers Net/day Total Net/day
    WarEra Company Profit & Build Optimizer · uses public WarEra API (api2, auto-failover)
